title: pelargonium abrotanifolium
intro: Pelargonium abrotanifolium, also known as the Lemon-scented Geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its strong lemon fragrance and robust leaves. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium abrotanifolium include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to soothe wounds and reduce fever. Traditionally, Pelargonium abrotanifolium is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
